title: Better with Datapack
description: A lightweight modpack that doesn’t add mods, only datapacks to expand and tweak Minecraft’s gameplay. Perfect for players who want new mechanics and features without losing the vanilla feel.
body:
**⚠ WARNING:** This modpack is **not exclusive to Fabric**, it only uses Fabric to automatically add data packs to the world's `datapacks` folder. However, it works perfectly with any other mod loader, even vanilla.

A lightweight modpack that doesn’t add any mods, **only datapacks**, to expand and tweak Minecraft’s gameplay.  
Perfect for players who want **new mechanics and features** without losing the **vanilla feel**.

## Features
<details>
<summary>Terrain Generation</summary>

[**Blooming Biosphere** _(only <=1.2.0)_](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blooming-biosphere) & [**Tectonic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) & [**Custom Biome Saplings** _(only <=1.2.0)_](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith-biome-saplings)

This worldgen enhances biome details and atmosphere while keeping the vanilla look. It overhauls all biomes, adds 7 new ones, and includes features like fallen logs, better trees, stone cliffs, and improved biome placement.

You can also regrow custom trees with vanilla saplings, or hold crouch to grow regular vanilla trees instead.

[**Cliff under a Tree** _(only >=2.0.0)_](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree) & [**Tectonic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) & [**ButterBee** _(only <=2.0.0)_](https://modrinth.com/datapack/butterbee) [_(Required resource pack)_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/butterbee-rp)

This a world generation datapack that adds new biomes to the Overworld and bringing a fresh touch to some existing ones, all while maintaining the spirit of vanilla.

Adding new biome-dependant variants for chickens, cows, pigs, wolves, and even one new frog! This add-on will hopefully make exploration feel fresh, as you might discover new faces along your journey!

[**Endercon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/endercon)

The goal is to make The End more interesting and fun to explore, without out-of-place blocks, and with terrain shaped for easy traversal using ender pearls, avoiding the need to place excessive blocks to move forward.

[**Hearths**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hearths)

New features and structures to the vanilla Nether. It improves three existing biomes — Nether Wastes, Crimson Forest, and Warped Forest — and introduces two new structures: the Crimson Tower and Warped Tower.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mechanics</summary>

[**Better Hanging Signs**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-hanging-signs)

You can easily display items on hanging signs.
Simply place a glow or normal item frame on a hanging sign, then add the item you want to showcase.

[**Blasting**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blasting-plus)/[**Smoking**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/smoking-plus) Plus & [**Colored Dyeing**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/redye-dyeable-colored-blocks-colored-dyeing-1-18x/)

All of these items can already be smelted or cooked in a furnace in vanilla.
Now, they can also be processed in the Blast Furnace and Smoker!

You can also redye colored blocks using the crafting table!

[**Clumps**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ly-clumps)

Merge experience orbs and instant pickup experience orbs to reduce lag!

[**Disable Too Expensive**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/disable-too-expensive) & [**Nadir** _(only Soulbind)_](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nadir)

Removes the Too Expensive message from items and anvils!
Just select the item with your cursor to clear the message.

New enchantment: Soulbind — keeps the item safe on death and returns it to you after respawning.
Can be applied to almost any item, but it’s incompatible with Curse of Vanishing.

[**Vanilla Tweaks**](https://vanillatweaks.net)
1. Assigns effective tools to blocks that normally don’t have one (e.g., pickaxe for glass, axe for cactus). Blocks meant to have no effective tool, like powder snow, reinforced deepslate, and vault blocks, are excluded.
1. Use a stonecutter to select different painting variants.

[**Bookshelf Inspector**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gm4-bookshelf-inspector)

See the contents of your Chiseled Bookshelves without removing the books!
Stand still and look at a book inside to view its name.

[**Vanilla Refresh**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-refresh) | Standalone

1. Adds dynamic sound effects and light particle animations when crafting items, heard by you and nearby players.
1. Includes an RPG-style day counter that appears at the start of each Minecraft day with a typewriter effect and sound.

[**Librarian's Balance**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/librarians-balance)

Place an enchanted book on a librarian’s lectern, and their first or second book trade will change to match it. Some books are [treasure](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Enchanting#Summary_of_enchantments) enchantments and these will produce untradable (sealed) variants when bought from a Librarian in this way.

Villager book trades are random up to Level 3. To get Level 4 or 5 trades, you need to first obtain the book and use the custom trade mechanic.
Combining two books on an anvil can also upgrade their level.

Librarians don’t trade Mending by default, so players must find it in the world (End Cities or Ancient Cities). Once obtained, placing it on a lectern allows trading for more.

[**Shulker Boxes Names**](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulker-boxes-names)

Shows the custom name of shulker boxes above them when placed, making it easier to organize builds or manage farms.

[**Totem Rebalance**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/totem-rebalance)

Removes the totem of undying from raids, only evokers in woodland mansions drop them. Additionally, totems can be obtained from ominous vaults with the same probability as heavy cores.

[**Veinminer**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer) & [**Veinminer Enchantment**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer-enchantment)

Mine a single ore to break the full vein of the same ore.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>

[**Blaze Attack Animation**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blaze-attack-animation)

Gives blazes a new animation when shooting their fireballs. It now summons them from the side, then top, then side, one by one, then shooting them at the player.

[**Vanilla Tweaks**](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

All shulkers drop 2 shells when defeated.

[**Mounts stay still**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mounts-stay-still)

Stop your horse (or any rideable entity with a saddle) from wandering away, otherwise, it could be thousands of blocks away in just a few minutes!

If you remove the saddle while riding, the feature stops working. But if you remove it after dismounting, your mount will stay exactly where you left it.

[**No Ghast Grief**](https://modrinth.com/mod/kawamood-no-ghast-grief)

Fireballs shot by ghasts will still damage entities on impact, but will no longer break blocks.

[**True Ending**](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-ending)

Overhauls the vanilla Ender Dragon. Fight a much stronger dragon with increased health, new attacks, and new phases that progressively raise the challenge.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Structures</summary>

[**Aether Ruined Portals**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aether-ruined-portal)

New ruined structure to the Overworld, The Ruined Aether Portals can be found in all Overworld.

[**Chamber Refurbished**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chamber-refurbished)

A overhauls chambers by improving weak spots and polishing the gameplay for a more handcrafted feel. It stays close to vanilla chambers but adds many small changes that make the experience richer.

[**Dungeons and Taverns**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) _(and all add-ons except [Stronghold Overhaul LITE edition](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dnt-stronghold-overhaul-lite-edition) and [End Castle Standalone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns-end-castle-standalone))_

A structure datapack that adds new buildings and dungeons to explore. These structures are designed to blend naturally into the vanilla world.

**Addons include:**
- New buildings and alarm towers in the ancient city.
- Desert temples with new rooms, husks, and traps.
- Jungle temples with new rooms, boggeds, and archaeology.
- Updated Nether fortress with new parts.
- Ocean monuments made bigger and rarer, with puzzles and treasure rooms.
- New towers and more loot at pillager outposts.
- A large stronghold with many new rooms.
- Swamp huts with different styles, loot, and decorations.
- Brings woodland mansions up to date with major improvements

**Hopo** [**Better Mineshaft**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hopo-better-mineshaft) & [**Better Ruined Portals**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hopo-better-ruined-portals) & [**Better Underwater Ruins**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hopo-better-underwater-ruins)

1. Over 10 new types appear in deepslate layers, featuring unique rooms, ores, and mobs for a fresh underground challenge.
1. Explore mysterious Overworld ruins left by Piglins. Loot includes obsidian, trimmed armor, weapons, and rare treasures like banners, potions, mob heads, and sherds.
1. Discover underwater cities, small ruins, and fossils. Encounter new mobs, loot, and surprises for a challenging ocean exploration experience.

[**Structory: Towers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/structory-towers)

Adds immersive, biome-themed towers to the world, such as outposts, firetowers, ocean monument pillars, Nether and End towers; and more.

</details>
